creator: man130117@outlook.com
text:
The recent update to autoconf213:

  Maintainer: tijl@FreeBSD.org,
  Last Update: 2022-05-27 09:51:04,
  Commit Hash: ec21025

could not be installed. Portmaster aborts with a question / error message:

  "Is /usr/ports/devel/autoconf213/Makefile missing?"

and indeed: autoconf213 directory is empty!?

OS: FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE releng/13.1-n250148-fc952ac2212 GENERIC amd64
